title: [codex] Add pollen flow dashboard
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds a provisioned Grafana dashboard for pollen cashflow and usage analysis.
- Tracks paid issued/spent, tier spent, subsidy estimate, paid liability, pack mix, and blended burn estimate.
- Defaults to last 7 days with 1 day, 7 day, and 1 month quick ranges.
- Validated with `jq empty`, `git diff --check`, and Grafana datasource API checks for every panel.

Note: the online dashboard was already deployed directly per request.

gist.headline: Tracking the nectar
gist.blurb: Added a new internal Grafana dashboard to track Pollen cashflow, usage, and pack mix. Keeping an eye on the hive's economy!
gist.summary: Added a provisioned Grafana dashboard to track Pollen cashflow, usage metrics, subsidy estimates, and pack mix over time.
gist.impact: Internal operations can now monitor paid versus tier spending, liabilities, and blended burn rates to better understand platform economics.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as an analyst, looking at charts and graphs on the Monitor Robot's screen. Golden pollen drops or honey jars nearby to represent the 'cashflow'.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at the chunky Monitor Robot whose screen displays colorful bar charts and graphs. A small glass jar filled with glowing golden pollen sits on a wooden desk. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
